title: Habenaria calva
taxonomy: Habenaria calva is classified under the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, it falls under the phylum Angiospermophyta. It belongs to the class Liliopsida, which is a group of flowering plants. Within the class Liliopsida, it is further classified under the order Asparagales, and then the family Orchidaceae. The genus Habenaria is a group of orchids, and it is within this genus that H. calva is placed. This classification helps to identify the unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships of this orchid species.
